framework.name: Pre-Configured System Integration
framework.description: Building agents with pre-baked knowledge of enterprise APIs, authentication protocols, and best practices for specific business systems. Reduces deployment friction by encoding expertise upfront.
framework.raw_quote: We already know the business systems that each and every one of you try to connect to. We have so much expertise with their APIs and their authentication.

source.title: AI Agent Marketplace: Instantly Deploy 100+ Enterprise-Ready Agents
